context: The response should exercise the `spec-validate` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: uses_multi_agent_consensus
checklist.description: Uses multiple independent reviewer passes or consensus to raise confidence in findings.

checklist.name: includes_expert_review
checklist.description: Applies relevant experts after or alongside subagent findings when available.

checklist.name: classifies_impact
checklist.description: Distinguishes impactful findings from nits or low-confidence suggestions.

checklist.name: applies_fixes_directly
checklist.description: Applies high-confidence impactful fixes directly to spec files rather than asking for approval.

checklist.name: writes_validated_sentinel
checklist.description: Finishes with the expected validated sentinel or clear completion marker.
